|---|

| x = x₀ + ½(v₀+v)t |

items.title: Solubility Rules (selected)
items.subject: chemistry
items.tableMarkdown:
| Rule | Notes |
|---|---|
| Group 1 & NH₄⁺ salts | Soluble |
| NO₃⁻, C₂H₃O₂⁻ | Soluble |
| Cl⁻, Br⁻, I⁻ | Soluble except Ag⁺, Pb²⁺, Hg₂²⁺ |
| SO₄²⁻ | Soluble except Ba²⁺, Pb²⁺, Ca²⁺ (sparing) |
| OH⁻, S²⁻, CO₃²⁻, PO₄³⁻ | Often insoluble (except Group 1) |

items.title: Central Dogma Flow
items.subject: biology
items.tableMarkdown:
| Step | From | To | Enzyme |
|---|---|---|---|
| Replication | DNA | DNA | DNA polymerase |
| Transcription | DNA | RNA | RNA polymerase |
| Translation | mRNA | Protein | Ribosome |

items.title: DNA/RNA Bases
items.subject: biology
items.tableMarkdown:
| Base | DNA | RNA | Pairs with |
|---|---|---|---|
| Adenine (A) | ✓ | ✓ | T (DNA) / U (RNA) |
| Thymine (T) | ✓ | — | A |
| Uracil (U) | — | ✓ | A |
| Guanine (G) | ✓ | ✓ | C |
| Cytosine (C) | ✓ | ✓ | G |
items.description: Base pairing and DNA vs RNA.

items.tableMarkdown:

|---|---|

| Chloroplast | Photosynthesis (plants) |
| Ribosome | Protein synthesis |
| ER / Golgi | Protein folding & trafficking |
| Lysosome | Degradation |
